metadata.philosophy: As Above, So Below - Hermetic Principles in Manufacturing
metadata.purpose: Test full capabilities of MOPA laser + CNC router

hermetic_principles.mentalism: THE ALL is MIND; The Universe is Mental
hermetic_principles.correspondence: As above, so below; as below, so above
hermetic_principles.vibration: Nothing rests; everything moves; everything vibrates
hermetic_principles.polarity: Everything is Dual; everything has poles
hermetic_principles.rhythm: Everything flows, out and in; everything has its tides
hermetic_principles.cause_effect: Every Cause has its Effect; every Effect has its Cause
hermetic_principles.gender: Gender is in everything; everything has Masculine and Feminine Principles

2d_laser.name: geometric_calibration

prompt.adobe_firefly: Sacred geometry calibration grid, black and white line art, precise circles, squares, hexagons arranged in perfect proportion, golden ratio divisions, minimalist technical drawing style, high contrast, vector-ready
prompt.style: Technical line art, monochrome, precise geometry

2d_laser.validation: Tests: Line precision, circle roundness, corner sharpness, power consistency

2d_laser.name: tree_of_life_kabbalah

prompt.adobe_firefly: Kabbalistic Tree of Life diagram, ten sephirot connected by 22 paths, mystical Hebrew letters, sacred geometry, black background with golden glowing lines and nodes, esoteric symbolism, ornate border with intricate patterns, occult manuscript style, high detail
prompt.wisdom_theme: As above, so below; as below, so above
prompt.symbols: 10 sephiroth, 22 paths, Hebrew letters (Aleph to Tav)
prompt.style: Mystical illuminated manuscript, gold on black

manufacturing.technique: Remove anodizing to reveal bright metal underneath
manufacturing.finish: High contrast: dark background, bright symbols

2d_laser.validation: Tests: Fine line detail, Hebrew letter legibility, depth consistency, complex pattern fidelity

2d_laser.name: mandala_holographic

prompt.adobe_firefly: Intricate mandala with concentric circles, sacred lotus petals, Sri Yantra triangles at center, gradient from white center to deep black outer rings, smooth transitions, radial symmetry, 8-fold geometric patterns, meditative spiritual art, ultra detailed
prompt.wisdom_theme: Nothing rests; everything moves; everything vibrates
prompt.symbols: Lotus (8-petals), Sri Yantra center, OM symbol
prompt.style: Spiritual mandala art, smooth gradients, radial symmetry

manufacturing.effect: Rainbow holographic colors when viewed at angles

2d_laser.validation: Tests: Gradient smoothness, diffraction color range, pitch accuracy, radial symmetry

25d_relief.name: hermetic_philosopher_portrait

prompt.adobe_firefly: Portrait of ancient Hermetic philosopher with long beard, wise eyes, wearing mystical robes covered in alchemical symbols, background with cosmic swirls and sacred geometry, dramatic side lighting casting shadows, Renaissance engraving style, high contrast grayscale for depth mapping, white=raised, black=deep cuts
prompt.wisdom_theme: THE ALL is MIND; The Universe is Mental
prompt.style: Albrecht Dürer engraving style, grayscale depth map

manufacturing.material: Basswood, cherry, or MDF for testing
manufacturing.tool: Ball end mill 1/8" or 1/16" for detail

25d_relief.validation: Tests: Fine facial detail, depth gradient smoothness, tool path quality, surface finish

25d_relief.name: flower_of_life_3d_relief

prompt.adobe_firefly: Flower of Life sacred geometry in 3D relief, overlapping circles appear to float at different depths, gradient shading from white peaks to gray valleys, subtle embossed effect, monochromatic, soft lighting, dimensional depth map, smooth gradients between circles
prompt.wisdom_theme: As above, so below; as below, so above
prompt.style: 3D embossed relief, grayscale depth map, soft shadows

manufacturing.machine: CNC router or MOPA laser (emboss mode)

25d_relief.validation: Tests: Depth accuracy, circle intersection quality, gradient smoothness, geometric precision

3d_rotary.name: guardian_totem_unwrapped

prompt.adobe_firefly: Unwrapped cylindrical texture map for totem pole carving, three stacked guardian spirits: eagle at top, bear in middle, raven at bottom, Pacific Northwest indigenous art style, bold black formlines on white background, traditional Haida design, geometric patterns between figures, 360° seamless wrap pattern, rectangular format (360° width × height), grayscale for depth
prompt.style: Pacific Northwest indigenous, bold formlines, high contrast

manufacturing.material: Wood cylinder (pine, cedar, or basswood) 40mm dia × 100mm
manufacturing.technique: Black = deep carving, White = surface level

3d_rotary.validation: Tests: Cylindrical wrap accuracy, 360° seamless join, face detail, depth variation, rotary axis precision

3d_rotary.name: alchemy_symbols_wrap

prompt.adobe_firefly: Unwrapped texture for cylinder: alchemical symbols arranged in horizontal bands, mercury/sulfur/salt symbols, planetary glyphs, element symbols (🜂🜃🜁🜄), transmutation stages, medieval manuscript style, gold and black color scheme (gold=surface, black=carved), decorative borders between bands, seamless 360° wrap, grayscale depth map
prompt.wisdom_theme: Everything is Dual; everything has poles + Alchemy
prompt.color: Grayscale or gold/black for depth mapping

manufacturing.finish: Polish brass, apply patina to recessed areas

3d_rotary.validation: Tests: Symbol legibility, band alignment, seamless wrap, depth consistency, rotary synchronization
